detail.description:
This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.

Whether you love strategy games, fast-paced tower defense, or chaotic action, Plants vs. Zombies™ 3: Evolved delivers a fresh spin on defending against every zombie attack. Step into Neighborville today to grow, merge and experiment with new tactics as you help shape a wild, taco-fueled tower defense against Dr. Zomboss’ late
detail.recentChanges:
WHAT’S NEW

Merge: Use meteorite power to merge 55+ unique plants (very scientific!)
Adventures: Help Dave and the plants confront Dr. Zomboss in 100 story levels!
Lawn Patrol: Explore new plants and zombies!
Expeditions: Play really hard battles, for funnzies!
My Yard: Collect weird objects to display in your yard for decreased curb appeal!
Zen Garden: Nurture your plant buddies… then mulch them into seeds for upgrades? (You monster!)
Odd Jobs: Play Dave’s mini-games to power up your… garden?
